name: browzer
description: AI agent skills to empower it with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Fourteen SKILLs around the `browzer` CLI, organized in three groups: RAG (embed-workspace-graphs, embed-documents, explore-workspace-graphs, semantic-search, dependency-graph, ingestion-jobs), workflow (prd → task → execute → commit → sync), and ops + tools (use-rag-cli, auth-status, workspace-management). Use for code search, doc Q&A, ingesting a repo into a vector + graph store, Graph RAG over Neo4j, and an end-to-end PRD-to-merge dev workflow.

BROWZER_SERVER.title: Browzer server URL
BROWZER_SERVER.description: Base URL of the Browzer gateway (e.g. https://browzeremb.com or http://localhost:8080).

BROWZER_API_KEY.title: Browzer API key
BROWZER_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for non-interactive login. If unset, run `browzer login` once interactively.
